case_title: VICTOR LOO, TRUSTEE VS. UNION FINANCIAL PARTNERS, SAN FRANCISCO et al

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,950.00 FILED BY LOO, TRUSTEE, VICTOR ANNE J. MALIK LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT UNION FINANCIAL PARTNERS, SAN FRANCISCO JOHN PETER HARBOUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOO, TRUSTEE, VICTOR ANNE J. MALIK LIVING TRUST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNION FINANCIAL PARTNERS, SAN FRANCISCO JOHN PETER HARBOUR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
